connectors.name: Google BigQuery
connectors.description: Google BigQuery serverless data warehouse, accessed over the ADBC BigQuery driver. Authenticates with a service-account JSON key (default) or an OAuth user-credential flow; all connection state is passed via adbc.bigquery.* driver options.

connectors.name: DuckDB
connectors.description: Connector for DuckDB, an embedded in-process OLAP database. Connects via the duckdb_engine SQLAlchemy dialect to a local database file or an in-memory database. DuckDB is not a client-server system: there is no host, port, username, password, or TLS handshake; access is governed by local filesystem permissions.

connectors.name: EasyBill
connectors.description: EasyBill invoicing & accounting REST API — documents, customers, positions, payments and more.

connectors.name: MariaDB
connectors.description: MariaDB relational database — a community-developed, open-source fork of MySQL. Connects over the MySQL wire protocol via the SQLAlchemy mariadb+pymysql dialect for structured data storage, querying, and table discovery.

connectors.name: MySQL
connectors.description: Open-source relational database management system for structured data storage, querying, and management

connectors.name: PostgreSQL
connectors.description: Open-source relational database management system known for reliability, feature robustness, and performance

connectors.name: Amazon Redshift
connectors.description: Amazon Redshift cloud data warehouse connector using the SQLAlchemy 'redshift+redshift_connector' dialect (Amazon's official redshift_connector driver). Authenticates with a database username and password over TLS. AWS IAM temporary credentials are not supported in this version.

connectors.name: sevdesk
connectors.description: Cloud-based accounting and invoicing platform for small businesses and freelancers in the DACH region.

connectors.name: Snowflake
connectors.description: Snowflake cloud data warehouse connector using the native ADBC Snowflake driver with standard username and password authentication over TLS.

connectors.name: Wise (API Key)
connectors.description: International money transfer and multi-currency account platform (formerly TransferWise)

connectors.name: Xero
connectors.description: Xero cloud accounting platform. Read accounting data — invoices, contacts, bank transactions, credit notes, payments, items, journals and more — via the Xero Accounting API (api.xro/2.0).
